name: Cuban Potato Salad with Scallion Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Small red potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
2 bunches Scallions, white and part of green, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of salted water to a boil and cook the potatoes until tender, about 10 minutes. Set aside.
2. When cool, transfer the cooked potatoes to a large bowl and combine with black beans.
3. In a blender, combine the scallions, sour cream, and lemon juice. Pulse a few times to mix, then puree until smooth. Add salt, pepper, and mayonnaise. Blend just to combine.
4. Drizzle vinaigrette over salad, then toss until potatoes and beans are well coated.
5. Garnish with thinly-sliced chives.
This recipe yields approximately 8 servings.
